item.title: Kubernetes Commands
item.author: Author
item.description: POD POD List 1 kubectl get pods Create POD with YAML 1 kubectl create -f pod-definition.yml Create POD with Command 1 kubectl run myapp-pod --image nginx POD Detail 1 kubectl describe pod myapp-pod Change running POD 1 kubectl edit pod myapp-pod Delete POD 1 kubectl delete pod myapp-pod
